creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Apr 30, 2008 at 10:41:01AM -0400, Jon Nistor wrote:
> Wesley,
> 
> After looking at the patch I totally approve it.  Although I'm at a loss 
> where you find the rrdtool stuff fits in ...

Thanks.  I'll get it committed soon then, unless you want to also turn
on rrdtool...

Looking at the log of the build I see the following:

SUMMARY:

OS: freebsd5.5

Included in Compilation:
  bmon:   Yes   -lm -lncurses -ldbi

Dependencies:
bmon:
  libm             Yes       (required)
  lib(n)curses     Yes       (suggested)
  librrd           No        (suggested)
  libdbi           Yes       (suggested)
  libasound        No        (toy)

I'm just curious if you want to enable that in the port or not?  If so I
can come up with a patch for it fairly quickly.

-- WXS
